rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §21.251 governs teacher contract termination hearing procedures. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 21.251. APPLICABILITY. (a) This subchapter applies if a teacher requests a hearing after receiving notice of the proposed decision to:
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption change and this educator employment hearing provision.
